problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
